# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.

Use safe data-only formats and validate the resulting structure/types before use.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

# config/initializers/session_store.rb
Rails.application.config.session_store :cookie_store, key: '_app_session'

# app/lib/marshal_session_store.rb
require 'base64'
require 'openssl'

class MarshalSessionStore
  ALLOWED_CLASSES = [
    NilClass, TrueClass, FalseClass,
    Integer, Float, String, Symbol,
    Array, Hash, Time, Date, DateTime,
    ActiveSupport::TimeWithZone,
    ActiveSupport::TimeZone,
    ActiveSupport::HashWithIndifferentAccess
  ].freeze

  ALLOWED_TYPES = ALLOWED_CLASSES.map(&:name).freeze

  MAX_SESSION_SIZE = 4096
  MAX_NESTING_DEPTH = 10

  class InvalidSessionData < StandardError; end
  class SessionTooLarge < StandardError; end

  def self.serialize(data)
    validated_data = validate_and_sanitize(data)
    serialized = Marshal.dump(validated_data)
    
    raise SessionTooLarge, "Session data exceeds #{MAX_SESSION_SIZE} bytes" if serialized.bytesize > MAX_SESSION_SIZE
    
    Base64.strict_encode64(serialized)
  end

  def self.deserialize(encoded_data)
    return {} if encoded_data.nil? || encoded_data.empty?
    
    decoded = Base64.strict_decode64(encoded_data)
    data = Marshal.load(decoded)
    
    validate_structure(data)
    sanitize_loaded_data(data)
  rescue ArgumentError, TypeError, Marshal::TypeError => e
    Rails.logger.warn("Failed to deserialize session: #{e.message}")
    {}
  end

  def self.validate_and_sanitize(data, depth = 0)
    raise InvalidSessionData, "Nesting depth exceeds maximum of #{MAX_NESTING_DEPTH}" if depth > MAX_NESTING_DEPTH
    
    case data
    when Hash
      data.each_with_object({}) do |(key, value), result|
        validated_key = validate_primitive(key)
        result[validated_key] = validate_and_sanitize(value, depth + 1)
      end
    when Array
      data.map { |item| validate_and_sanitize(item, depth + 1) }
    else
      validate_primitive(data)
    end
  end

  def self.validate_primitive(value)
    unless ALLOWED_CLASSES.any? { |klass| value.is_a?(klass) }
      raise InvalidSessionData, "Type #{value.class} is not allowed in session data"
    end
    
    case value
    when String
      raise InvalidSessionData, "String too large" if value.bytesize > 10_000
      value.dup.force_encoding('UTF-8')
    when Symbol
      value.to_s.length > 100 ? value.to_s[0..99].to_sym : value
    when Numeric
      value
    when Time, Date, DateTime, ActiveSupport::TimeWithZone
      value
    when NilClass, TrueClass, FalseClass
      value
    else
      value
    end
  end

  def self.validate_structure(data, depth = 0)
    raise InvalidSessionData, "Session data must be a Hash" unless data.is_a?(Hash)
    raise InvalidSessionData, "Nesting depth exceeds maximum" if depth > MAX_NESTING_DEPTH
    
    data.each do |key, value|
      validate_type(key)
      validate_value(value, depth)
    end
    
    true
  end

  def self.validate_value(value, depth)
    case value
    when Hash
      validate_structure(value, depth + 1)
    when Array
      value.each { |item| validate_value(item, depth + 1) }
    else
      validate_type(value)
    end
  end

  def self.validate_type(obj)
    unless ALLOWED_CLASSES.any? { |klass| obj.is_a?(klass) }
      raise InvalidSessionData, "Invalid type #{obj.class} found in session"
    end
  end

  def self.sanitize_loaded_data(data)
    case data
    when Hash
      data.each_with_object({}) do |(key, value), result|
        sanitized_key = sanitize_key(key)
        result[sanitized_key] = sanitize_loaded_data(value)
      end
    when Array
      data.map { |item| sanitize_loaded_data(item) }
    when String
      data.dup.force_encoding('UTF-8').scrub
    else
      data
    end
  end

  def self.sanitize_key(key)
    case key
    when String
      key.to_s
    when Symbol
      key.to_s
    else
      key.to_s
    end
  end
end

# app/controllers/concerns/marshal_session_concern.rb
module MarshalSessionConcern
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  included do
    before_action :load_marshal_session
    after_action :save_marshal_session
  end

  private

  def load_marshal_session
    @marshal_session = MarshalSessionStore.deserialize(cookies.encrypted[:marshal_session])
  rescue => e
    Rails.logger.error("Error loading marshal session: #{e.message}")
    @marshal_session = {}
  end

  def save_marshal_session
    return unless @marshal_session && @marshal_session_modified

    serialized = MarshalSessionStore.serialize(@marshal_session)
    cookies.encrypted[:marshal_session] = {
      value: serialized,
      expires: 24.hours.from_now,
      httponly: true,
      secure: Rails.env.production?,
      same_site: :lax
    }
  rescue MarshalSessionStore::SessionTooLarge => e
    Rails.logger.error("Session too large: #{e.message}")
    flash[:error] = "Session data too large"
  rescue => e
    Rails.logger.error("Error saving marshal session: #{e.message}")
  end

  def marshal_session
    @marshal_session ||= {}
  end

  def marshal_session=(value)
    @marshal_session = value
    @marshal_session_modified = true
  end

  def update_marshal_session(key, value)
    marshal_session[key] = value
    @marshal_session_modified = true
  end

  def delete_from_marshal_session(key)
    marshal_session.delete(key)
    @marshal_session_modified = true
  end

  def clear_marshal_session
    @marshal_session = {}
    @marshal_session_modified = true
  end
end

# app/middleware/marshal_session_middleware.rb
class MarshalSessionMiddleware
  def initialize(app)
    @app = app
  end

  def call(env)
    request = ActionDispatch::Request.new(env)
    
    session_data = load_session(request)
    env['marshal_session'] = session_data
    
    status, headers, response = @app.call(env)
    
    save_session(request, headers, session_data) if session_data[:modified]
    
    [status, headers, response]
  end

  private

  def load_session(request)
    encrypted_cookie = request.cookie_jar.encrypted[:marshal_session]
    data = MarshalSessionStore.deserialize(encrypted_cookie)
    { data: data, modified: false }
  rescue => e
    Rails.logger.error("Marshal session load error: #{e.message}")
    { data: {}, modified: false }
  end

  def save_session(request, headers, session_data)
    serialized = MarshalSessionStore.serialize(session_data[:data])
    
    cookie_value = {
      value: serialized,
      path: '/',
      httponly: true,
      secure: Rails.env.production?,
      same_site: :lax,
      expires: 24.hours.from_now
    }
    
    request.cookie_jar.encrypted[:marshal_session] = cookie_value
  rescue => e
    Rails.logger.error("Marshal session save error: #{e.message}")
  end
end

# config/application.rb
# Add this line to config/application.rb:
# config.middleware.use MarshalSessionMiddleware
